audit_items.proof_trace: The guard `IERC20(asset).balanceOf(address(this))` at L437 reads the live on-chain balance immediately before the transfer at L444, and `if (amount > availableBalance) revert BidAmountTooHigh(...)` at L438-440 is unconditional on all paths through `bid()`. No external call exists between the check and the transfer (L442 `_getAssetOutAmount` is internal), and the reentrancy guard set at L418 prevents any concurrent `bid()` from draining the balance between check and transfer.
